raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.4": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The revised draft flags at least one claim the evidence does not support (e.g., 'lower estimated bias' vs actual metric).",
    "R1.4": "The agent maps against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta (e.g., propensity-score matching, BART/causal-forest estimators).",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence (e.g., 'nonparametric weighting scheme' is too vague to be informative).",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) (i.e., introduction/abstract structure, content gaps flagged).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., self-assessment removed, policy-evaluation motivation moved to intro).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason (e.g., Rosenbaum and Rubin citation parenthetical)."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.85,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The revised draft flags at least one claim the evidence does not support (e.g., 'lower estimated bias' vs actual metric).
rationale.R1.4: The agent maps against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta (e.g., propensity-score matching, BART/causal-forest estimators).
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence (e.g., 'nonparametric weighting scheme' is too vague to be informative).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) (i.e., introduction/abstract structure, content gaps flagged).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., self-assessment removed, policy-evaluation motivation moved to intro).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason (e.g., Rosenbaum and Rubin citation parenthetical).
